title: [#Mon#Monitor] 電腦螢幕集中討論#10 完全唔夠時間

replies.msg:
為左方便更新螢幕消息/資訊，所以整左一個google site出黎

https://sites.google.com/view/monitor101/首頁

有興趣可以睇下，如果有任何地方寫錯左，麻煩大家提點下小弟，唔該哂。

另外，新增左匿名螢幕報價單，目的係為左俾大家知道門市最新價錢。若果大家行過腦場個陣記得個價錢，不妨記得佢然後寫上去。

有問題歡迎發問(雖然唔係經常online，但我會盡量覆)。

避免日經/週經既出現，麻煩大家係發問前睇一睇個網站先

因為va本身就係垃圾
暗位一舊野, va對比度高黑位清, 但係黑位轉色最差, 睇戲冇問題, 打機就...
另外買得va最好盡量保持最大refresh rate, 否則會overshoot得好緊要, 亦即係冇左freesync/gsync最強既低fps優勢

https://pcmonitors.info/reviews/aoc-ag322qcx/
There were some weaknesses, particularly during dark transitions, whereby some more pronounced trailing could be seen. This was not as widespread as we’ve seen on some VA models, where frequent smearing would mar the experience and really limit the appeal regardless of refresh rate. There were still those niggling ‘sluggish’ transitions though, which some users really dislike – and these crop up more commonly on some titles than others. The monitor also provided support for AMD FreeSync, which worked as we would hope to combat tearing and stuttering from traditional refresh rate and frame rate mismatches. As frame rate dropped, though, some quite strong overshoot was introduced using the ‘Overdrive’ setting that worked best at higher refresh rates. This weakness is by no means unique to this monitor, but is certainly an area that G-SYNC models tend to fair better in.

想問下用緊samsung既人覺唔覺得d色好假/錯哂?
見有鬼佬屌哂鬼

http://www.overclock.net/t/1625438/various-samsung-2017-monitor-lineup/790
What really annoys me is the way samsung is currently advertising/marketing their new monitors. They use the term QLED for their VA panels with quantum dot backlight, so that people that are not really savy/knowledgeable about monitors confuse it with OLED and think that it is just/almost as good.

They also advertise with a 1ms response time (and in very tiny letters they clarify that this number only applys to the mprt) so people think this is a very fast monitor, when in fact the opposite is the case, it uses a VA panel which has the slowest pixel response times of all current LCD types currently.

They advertise quantum dot for the brilliant colours, but what they don't explain is that this doesn't mean much becauser all the source content you watch on PC(pictures, films, games etc.) are in sRGB, that means unless you calibrate your screen, use a proper colormanagement with ICC profiles or a SRGB emulation mode, all colors displayed will be incorrect, and some may argue that this is not a big deal because they are no professional artists, certain oversaturations for example when human skin is displayed it will always have a sort of red tint and the impression will be completly different from the correct skin color , if you don't calibrate it/ use colormanagement .
So having a wide gammut monitor like this that doesn't use any standards also comes with its own disadvatages.

The HDR and local dimming feature they advertise for their new models also seem rather useless , at least so far.

And they get away with it, thats the funny thing. I read at different forums, people are head over heels, because this screen has 1ms ! HDR, local dimming ! and the brilliant color of QLED !! how much better can it get ?

Damn Samsung

http://www.overclock.net/t/1625438/various-samsung-2017-monitor-lineup/790
What really annoys me is the way samsung is currently advertising/marketing their new monitors. They use the term QLED for their VA panels with quantum dot backlight, so that people that are not really savy/knowledgeable about monitors confuse it with OLED and think that it is just/almost as good.

They also advertise with a 1ms response time (and in very tiny letters they clarify that this number only applys to the mprt) so people think this is a very fast monitor, when in fact the opposite is the case, it uses a VA panel which has the slowest pixel response times of all current LCD types currently.

They advertise quantum dot for the brilliant colours, but what they don't explain is that this doesn't mean much becauser all the source content you watch on PC(pictures, films, games etc.) are in sRGB, that means unless you calibrate your screen, use a proper colormanagement with ICC profiles or a SRGB emulation mode, all colors displayed will be incorrect, and some may argue that this is not a big deal because they are no professional artists, certain oversaturations for example when human skin is displayed it will always have a sort of red tint and the impression will be completly different from the correct skin color , if you don't calibrate it/ use colormanagement .
So having a wide gammut monitor like this that doesn't use any standards also comes with its own disadvatages.

The HDR and local dimming feature they advertise for their new models also seem rather useless , at least so far.

And they get away with it, thats the funny thing. I read at different forums, people are head over heels, because this screen has 1ms ! HDR, local dimming ! and the brilliant color of QLED !! how much better can it get ?

Damn Samsung


我估係個鬼佬ON 9 姐
第一三段講既野係Nonsense 黎, 睇黎佢冇研究過咩係Quantum dot
Quantum dot 只似用左nanocrystal 既技術去製造超微型LED, 用小量能源(power)去轉化成光學能量(photon energy), 而當中既photon loss又係極小, 所以顯示出黎三原色會比傳統WLED 更加豐富

係咪用Quantum dot都唔會轉左個color profile... 相反, Quantum dot 可以cover哂sRGB 成個spectrum, 所以鬼佬講既野只係佢知一半唔知一半姐...

不過VA panel的確係BWB responsiveness 最弱既一種panel, 但邊種panel冇缺陷

at 144hz.....With this set to ‘Off’ the trailing is largely comparable to 60Hz – significant trailing, particularly for the dark background.

At 60Hz you can see that the object itself looks relatively soft, broad and quite ‘fuzzy’ in its appearance. This indicates a relatively high level of perceived blur caused by eye (camera) movement. There are various degrees of trailing behind the object, too, which comes down to pixel responsiveness. As this is a VA panel, there is quite a bit of variation between the speed of pixel responses depending on the grey level (i.e. shade depth) that the monitor is transitioning to and from. With ‘Overdrive = Off’ you can see a significant amount of trailing behind the object for the dark background, a little less but still a lot for the medium background and significantly less (but still some) for the light background.

C27 is probably no different. It's very annoying in some applications or when using split screen with documents etc. There is a test image in my review.

始終係va, va打機喺ghosting同overshoot之間可以選擇既空間唔大, 你見samsung都只係set多幾個mode出黎俾人揀, 你可以話aoc懶得tune, 但呢個係va本身既問題, va要攻gaming呢範, 搵到方法增加pixel電壓又唔overshoot再講, 否則都係得啖笑

At 144Hz, with the ‘Standard’ setting, the overshoot is perhaps marginally reduced again. The clarity is actually quite similar to the reference display for these transitions. With the ‘Faster’ and ‘Fastest’ setting the strobe backlight mode is activated. The clarity of the main object is excellent, but there is again a little overshoot that is reduced slightly compared to lower refresh rates. The ‘Faster’ and ‘Fastest’ modes are fairly similar, although the overshoot is more noticeable with a more obvious woven texture with the ‘Fastest’ setting. With the ‘Faster’ setting you can see a slight trail in front of the object, which indicates that the pixel responses weren’t quite able to keep up with the requirements for ‘clean’ 144Hz strobing. This is quite faint and also visible to some extent at 120Hz.

其實好多人中伏，因為隻野係出12" retina MacBook時同時出，而因為部機個type-C只有USB 3.1 gen 1所以Apple出個轉插4k30Hz止步

重點係，如果你去買一個USB-C轉mDP插，兩面插頭係同佢完全一樣樣

全條chain都要有color management先可以保證wide color gamut既source係用緊正確既color profile去display，如果chain內有樽頸就會俾佢限
LR係用ProPhoto RGB，UP2716D係100%Adobe RGB不過要set，Windows係無限(ProPhoto同ARGB support)不過要set
其他垃雜apps，包括browser同OS set desktop wallpaper都可以唔respect color profile，default左去sRGB或者更窄
另外如果只係淺左深左可以係因為gamma，同gamut係兩樣獨立既野
你究竟係搵食定係打算學黎搵食? 我唔係業餘hea，建議你真係爬足文先俾個結論自己究竟望緊d咩同點解

香港網友們大家好!!!

本人來自台灣,
整理電腦螢幕Monitor資訊, 也差不多有半年時間了.

得知LIHKG是香港港友最多的地方,
所以來這邊想分享自己整理的結果
也給香港朋友們參考看看, 應該也多少也有幫助.

另外也看大部分都集中在這個帖, 也就不開新帖了,
免得分散討論又有競爭意味, 可能在這個帖分享分享就夠了.


星河電腦螢幕資訊分享站
https://sites.google.com/view/twmonitors/首頁

↑↑↑這是本人的個人網站連結,
是看到多鮫魚做的網站後, 自己也整理了下製作的.

內容包含了台灣已上市的所有 144HZ/21:9/4K 螢幕資訊
整理出規格表, 挑選方向等等可以參考的部分.
也標出每一個產品採用的面板是什麼

還有一些個人認為比較有趣有意義的知識.

以下幾張照片大概顯示本人網站的內容
歡迎多多利用, 參考一下了!
有什麼建議也可以告知一下本人了, 謝謝唷!!

各地討論的方式不同啊
有時候在巴哈看文章覺得各位台灣朋友很慘
明明一句幹你娘就能解決的事非要花上半天打擦邊球而且版務還有可能把大家水桶掉
即使你到了別的香港的討論區也是這樣
只是程度不同
註冊有難度理論上比較少支那狗，不過認賊作父的人在哪都不少，而且連登的帳號主要要求使用大學電郵，香港不少大學早已投共，每年一大堆學位分給支那學生，然後那些支那狗上來四處生事，我們一般稱呼牠們為五毛黨，很容易分辦的。

S2418H因為有HDMI2.0a，所以可以接受4k 60Hz HDR信號
Panel只是FHD1080，不過應該用了硬解/interpolation之類的方法將4K以1/4 downscale表示

至於Dell HDR（偽HDR)就是Dell自家定義的HDR，參數上不及業界標準HDR10，尤其是peak brightness的nit值
不過因為dynamic range仍比普通SDR為高所以這樣叫
這方法的確會見到比SDR更多顏色，不過因為參值半天吊所以實用性有限

不要再推介U2718Q了, 我換了五台每一台都有問題, 最後退貨了

第一台: 背光不均勻， 有亮點，屏幕裏有塵，調低亮度會閃
第二台: 屏幕正中央有一大顆塵， 有三至四個像數點那麼大
第三台: 陰陽屏，屏幕裏有至少五顆麈
第四台: 左下角偏黃，一顆亮點
第五台: 左邊偏黃，四角明顯偏暗，調低亮度會閃

綠色問題就不要計了, 反正每一台都有
前四台是六月生產的rev.A00, 最後一台九月 rev.A01

http://wecravegamestoo.com/forums/monitor-reviews-discussion/15713-best-144hz-240hz-monitors.html#post1357728

The Viewsonic XG2401 has much better image quality than the AOC, Asus and Nixeus 1080p options which should only be considered if one likes getting ripped off or will not save up the extra money for the Viewsonic.

The Acer GN246HL (review by PRAD) and Asus VG24QE (review by NCX) are terrible choices compared to the 144hz monitors in this thread since they use LED PWM Dimming which ruins motion clarity (example), and have abysmal (Acer GN246HL and VG248QE with 3D/Lightboost enabled) or mediocre (VG248QE @144hz) colors and contrast.

The AOC G2460PQU (Review by PRAD) also uses PWM and has slow pixel response times compared to modern competitors, but it does have better preset color accuracy than the terrible Acer and mediocre VG248QE.

The W10 HDR button is there to make it easier than going into the monitor's menu and turning off HDR. To use HDR you need to enable movie mode and Smart HDR in the monitor's menu settings. When Smart HDR mode is off, the HDR button in W10 does not show up until you enable it again. Doing this with OBS running caused OBS to crash. The delay at the end is due to having to use the monitor's menu to turn off Smart HDR, and you can see the W10 HDR button disappears.

What you can't see is the monitor's brightness and color dims and fades with HDR mode on until you play a video. With it off the brightness and color return to normal.

看了一下那個影片底下的敘述,
所以這可能是一個配合當初所說的"Smart HDR"功能的按鍵開關?

要利用HDR一般需要打開"電影模式"與"Smart HDR"
但現在做到系統裡面讓他變得更簡單了, 比起進入選單關掉螢幕HDR.

當"Smart HDR"關閉狀態之下, W10 HDR按鍵不會顯示.

按下該按鍵直到播放HDR影片之前, 色彩與亮度都會變暗.
但關掉之後馬上就會回復到正常的顏色與亮度.

個人認為XG2401才是這個價位附近最強的.

http://wecravegamestoo.com/forums/monitor-reviews-discussion/15713-best-144hz-240hz-monitors.html#post1357728

The Viewsonic XG2401 has much better image quality than the AOC, Asus and Nixeus 1080p options which should only be considered if one likes getting ripped off or will not save up the extra money for the Viewsonic.

The Acer GN246HL (review by PRAD) and Asus VG24QE (review by NCX) are terrible choices compared to the 144hz monitors in this thread since they use LED PWM Dimming which ruins motion clarity (example), and have abysmal (Acer GN246HL and VG248QE with 3D/Lightboost enabled) or mediocre (VG248QE @144hz) colors and contrast.

The AOC G2460PQU (Review by PRAD) also uses PWM and has slow pixel response times compared to modern competitors, but it does have better preset color accuracy than the terrible Acer and mediocre VG248QE.

台灣大大你好,昨天在上網查的時候也看過一些討論,led pwm controller問題好像是會影響最低亮度?
你這樣一提我也留意到這滿重要的...之前由ccfl轉成led感覺超不舒服,習慣了很久.不知是不是那led螢幕比較差所致
不過大大你提出viewsonic那台比較好的原因是? 色彩差別?
還是我應該先去賣場實際觀測一下?


PWM影響用久傷眼度, 越低亮度下使用閃爍頻率越低越傷.
是背光驅動控制電路設計不良造成.

XG2401為什麼好, 因為那個作者已經濾掉很多型號了.
看得懂英文原文的人+看的懂評測報告的人講出來的話自然比較能相信.
